cutover_ready.meaning: all pre-cutover evidence is present and current, but production source-of-truth has not switched

final_x_eligible.meaning: actual production source-of-truth switch has executed and post-cutover readback confirms runtime writer is authoritative

cutover_evidence_accepted_for_review.meaning: artifact shape and non-secret evidence are accepted for operator review

actual_cutover_executed.meaning: external artifact proves explicit production source-of-truth switch and post-cutover readback

final_x_eligible.meaning: actual cutover artifact, post-cutover readback, no-dual proof, rollback proof, and secret-safe checks all pass

cutover_evidence_watcher_checklist_contr.closure_rule: E9 must not be marked [x] until real commit/cutover/readback/rollback proof are all present and final_closure_audit.final_x_eligible is true

future_write_audit_contract.snapshot_policy: bounded public ids and amounts only

future_write_contract.audit_snapshot_policy: bounded public ids and amounts only
future_write_contract.omitted_material_policy: no raw request, raw ledger snapshot, raw metadata, or credential material

error.message: ledger adjustment execute requires transactional ledger writer

execute_contract.audit_snapshot_policy: bounded public ids and amounts only

audit_contract.snapshot_policy: bounded public ids and amounts only

safe_output_contract.audit_snapshot_policy: bounded public ids and amounts only
